title: Global Creator Challenge Discord Linking Event
original_title: Global Creator Challenge Discord Linking Event
author: MSW_Creators
summary: Global Creator Challenge participants in the United States and Canada, excluding Quebec, can enter a Discord account-linking raffle through October 7, 2026. Six winners receive a one-month Claude Pro subscription by direct message from an official MapleStory Worlds administrator.

images.alt: Global Creator Challenge Discord Linking Event

sections.title: Event period and prize
items: Runs from July 2 at 05:00 UTC through October 7 at 14:59 UTC.
Six raffle winners receive a one-month Claude Pro subscription through Discord direct message.

sections.title: How to enter
items: Join the Global Creator Challenge Discord server and link a Nexon Account to the Discord profile.
Entry is complete when the account receives the CREATOR role.
The linked account must remain registered through prize distribution.

sections.title: Eligibility
items: Participation is limited to the United States and Canada, excluding Quebec.
Only one gift can be awarded per Discord account linked to a Nexon Account, and policy violations or abnormal participation invalidate the entry.

event_name: Global Creator Challenge Discord Linking Event
